item.title: The Mustard Seed Bitcoin Podcast – Coffeezilla vs 11%+ Digital Credit Yields and Why Bitcoin is Ready To Run | Joe Consorti
item.description:
Bitcoin is evolving into a unique asset that responds to both crisis and liquidity expansion. In this conversation, we break down how macro policy, market structure, and institutional flows are reshaping bitcoin’s role in global portfolios. The result is a shift toward bitcoin as a core asset for long-term capital allocation.


Timestamps:

0:00 Introduction and current bitcoin market setup

0:23 Price levels, resistance, and defining a new bull market

1:30 Macro backdrop: war, uncertainty, and market reactions

2:40 Bitcoin as chaos insurance across global crises

4:00 Performance vs gold, S&P 500, and shifting perception

5:00 Liquidity asset vs risk-off asset: reconciling the paradox

6:30 Dual drivers: global liquidity and crisis demand

8:00 Declining volatility and shallower bitcoin drawdowns

9:30 Why traditional markets avoid prolonged recessions

12:00 Debt dynamics and the inevitability of policy response

14:00 Faster Fed response cycles from 2008 to today

16:00 The “big print” and bitcoin as the primary beneficiary

17:30 Role of technology and information flow in policy decisions

20:00 Monetary policy, asset inflation, and wealth concentration

21:30 Fastest stock market rally since 1982 and implications

23:30 V-shaped recoveries and forward market returns

25:00 Institutional positioning and bullish equity signals

27:00 Treasury market stress and liquidity risks

28:30 Why markets rise in both good and bad scenarios

30:00 Bitcoin’s origin and alignment with monetary debasement

31:30 Coffeezilla debate and digital credit misconceptions

35:00 STRC mechanics and sustainability of yield

40:00 Bitcoin balance sheet coverage and risk framing

43:30 Bitcoin decoupling from tech and software stocks

46:00 Long-term path toward an uncorrelated asset

46:30 What to own if bitcoin did not exist

48:30 Closing thoughts and where to follow

]]>

item.title: Unchained – Bits + Bips: Why the AI Rally Keeps Growing — and Why Circle Launched Arc
item.description:
Ram says the entire market is now one giant AI trade. Chris argues the boom is backed by real fundamentals. Austin asks: is AI creating value for the right companies?

---

Thank you to our sponsor!

Coinbase One: Get 20% off the first year of your Coinbase One annual plan at coinbase.com/unchained.


Heads up!

If you haven’t yet, be sure to subscribe to Bits + Bips, since the show will migrate there in a few weeks. Follow us on ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Apple Podcasts⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠YouTube⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Spotify⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠X⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Unchained⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ and wherever you get your podcasts.

----

Circle just made history as the first publicly traded company to run a token presale, raising $222 million from BlackRock, Apollo, ICE, and a16z at a $3 billion valuation — and the stock went up.

At the same time, Coinbase reported a $394 million loss, cut 700 jobs, and suffered a five-hour outage. 

Ram, Austin, and Chris work through what's really happening: whether Circle's Arc is the institutional payment rail the industry has been waiting for or a financial engineering play, whether Coinbase's troubles are cyclical or structural, and whether the AI-driven market rally is a bubble forming or a fundamental shift that makes the dotcom comparison wrong.


Hosts:

  • ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Austin Campbell (@austincampbell) — Founder, Zero Knowledge Consulting; Adjunct Professor, NYU Stern

  • ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Ram Ahluwalia⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, Co-Host, CEO of Lumida

  • ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Chris Perkins⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, Co-Host, CEO of 250 Digital Asset Management

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit megaphone.fm/adchoices

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock'n'Roll – How Europe Is Rewriting Financial Rules for DLT: MISP overview
item.description:
In this episode of BFRR – Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll, host Manuel welcomes back Dr. Anika Patz, partner at YPOG and one of Germany’s leading legal experts on digital assets, digital money and financial market regulation. Together they unpack a regulatory development for Europe’s capital markets: the Market Integration and Supervision Package, or MISP.

Anika explains how MISP is designed to simplify and harmonize European capital market rules, reduce fragmentation across EU member states and give ESMA a much stronger supervisory role. The conversation then zooms in on the DLT Pilot Regime, Europe’s framework for blockchain-based trading and settlement infrastructures. While the regime was meant to enable real-life experimentation with tokenized securities, DLT settlement systems and combined trading-and-settlement models, uptake has remained limited due to product restrictions, volume caps, time limits and a heavy licensing burden.

The episode explores how MISP could change that. Proposed reforms would raise volume thresholds, remove product limitations and make DLT-based infrastructure a more permanent, scalable option for the market. Anika also discusses how the Central Securities Depositories Regulation may recognize DLT systems and stablecoin-based settlement, why e-money tokens and tokenized money market funds could become relevant for collateral, and where EMIR, MiFIR and MiCA may need alignment.

Beyond the legal details, Manuel and Anika reflect on the implications for Europe. Can the EU move quickly enough to remain competitive with the US and Asian markets? Should parts of the DLT Pilot Regime be carved out and accelerated? And will European supervision help create an integrated capital market, or add complexity for firms navigating crypto and securities regulation?

Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll Website

Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll Telegram Channel

Point Zero Forum: Join us in Zurich on 23–25 June 2026 at the Point Zero Forum, the annual gathering of 2,000+ policymakers, central bankers, regulators, and industry leaders at the intersection of finance, technology, and policy: Click here. Use the code "BFRR2026" to get 30% off the full-price Industry Pass. BFRR is proud media partner of the event. Relai: Buy Bitcoin with Relai—you can do a one-time purchase or savings plan: Click here. Use the referral code "ROCK" to reduce transaction fees by 0.1% while supporting Bitcoin, Fiat & Rock’n’Roll.

Value4Value Podcast Streaming: Support our podcast by listening to our episodes on the Fountain Podcast App. This way, if you wish, you can support us "Value4Value" while listening to the podcast. You can find us on the Fountain Podcast App here: Click here

Disclaimer: The content of this podcast reflects the private opinions of the hosts, serves exclusively for general information purposes and does not constitute investment advice. Always remember: Do your own research—inform yourself before making any investment decisions, such as buying Bitcoin. First try to understand what Bitcoin is and how to store it. This podcast does not provide financial advice. Note that the co-hosts might be invested in crypto assets. Read more on our website: Click here

All links marked with "*" are affiliate links. If you use these links for purchase, the podcast receives a small share of the revenue without any additional costs to you. On the contrary, affiliate links often include discount promotions, so you can even save money. We would appreciate it if you use these links to support us. Thank you very much!

item.title: Bitcoiners - Live From Bitcoin Beach – From Canada to El Salvador: Escaping Communism & Financial Surveillance For Bitcoin Country
item.description:
George McBride (@georgemcbride_ ) and SatStreet facilitate Bitcoin OTC trading and asset management for family offices moving to El Salvador’s Bitcoin legal tender economy.

Is your home country a fortress for your wealth, or is it a high-tax cage waiting to be locked by the legacy regime? George McBride from SatStreet joins the show to discuss why his family decided to exit Canada and go all-in on El Salvador. We dive into the "Flag in the Sand" moment when President Bukele declared Bitcoin as legal tender, signaling to the world that this jurisdiction is the only true sanctuary for those seeking absolute financial sovereignty.

For the family office or high-net-worth Bitcoiner, the biggest hurdle to exiting the fiat system has always been the friction of legacy banking. George explains how SatStreet provides the deep liquidity and white-glove otc trading services needed to move $50k to $100M+ into the country without the typical delays. If you are looking to acquire beachfront property or shift your asset management strategy to a pro-Bitcoin jurisdiction, having a partner who understands the local banking rails is the difference between a smooth transition and a compliance nightmare.

We also explore why foreign investment is currently flooding into the region, moving beyond just retail hype into institutional adoption. George breaks down how the country’s digital assets regulatory framework is outperforming the restrictive attitude of Western regulators. By building infrastructure and professionalizing the space, builders are proving that El Salvador is no longer an experiment but a global leader in capital efficiency.

The conversation gets practical for those planning their own exit strategy, specifically regarding the Land Cruiser problem. While the country is a pioneer, many local sellers still operate in the dark ages and demand dollars. George details how SatStreet acts as the bridge, allowing you to use your Bitcoin for large purchases like vehicles or land while the seller receives the fiat they are accustomed to. It is the necessary bridge to hyperbitcoinization that allows you to live the lifestyle today.

Finally, George shares details of his hour-long meeting with President Bukele and why the self-filtering mechanism of this country is its greatest strength. El Salvador is looking for the entrepreneurs and builders who are fed up with the status quo. If you are ready to stop being a spectator and start contributing to the most important economic shift in a generation, this episode is your roadmap for making the move.

—Bitcoin Beach Team



Connect and Learn more about George McBride
X: https://x.com/georgemcbride_
X (SatStreet SV): https://x.com/SatstreetSV
X: (SatStreet, Parent Company): https://x.com/Satstreet

Web: https://www.bitcoinbeach.com

Browse through this quick guide to learn more about the episode:
00:00 Intro
01:59 How to exit Canada and move your family to El Salvador in 2026?
09:39 How does a Bitcoin OTC desk facilitate institutional liquidity for expats?
15:35 How to move large Bitcoin amounts into El Salvador banks without rejections?

31:25 How does the new Bitcoin real estate escrow work for foreign buyers?
35:04 Why is El Salvador’s DASP framework better for Bitcoin businesses than the West?
46:00 What is the insider truth about President Bukele’s Bitcoin strategy

Live From Bitcoin Beach

item.itunes:summary:
George McBride (@georgemcbride_ ) and SatStreet facilitate Bitcoin OTC trading and asset management for family offices moving to El Salvador’s Bitcoin legal tender economy.

Is your home country a fortress for your wealth, or is it a high-tax cage waiting to be locked by the legacy regime? George McBride from SatStreet joins the show to discuss why his family decided to exit Canada and go all-in on El Salvador. We dive into the "Flag in the Sand" moment when President Bukele declared Bitcoin as legal tender, signaling to the world that this jurisdiction is the only true sanctuary for those seeking absolute financial sovereignty.

For the family office or high-net-worth Bitcoiner, the biggest hurdle to exiting the fiat system has always been the friction of legacy banking. George explains how SatStreet provides the deep liquidity and white-glove otc trading services needed to move $50k to $100M+ into the country without the typical delays. If you are looking to acquire beachfront property or shift your asset management strategy to a pro-Bitcoin jurisdiction, having a partner who understands the local banking rails is the difference between a smooth transition and a compliance nightmare.

We also explore why foreign investment is currently flooding into the region, moving beyond just retail hype into institutional adoption. George breaks down how the country’s digital assets regulatory framework is outperforming the restrictive attitude of Western regulators. By building infrastructure and professionalizing the space, builders are proving that El Salvador is no longer an experiment but a global leader in capital efficiency.

The conversation gets practical for those planning their own exit strategy, specifically regarding the Land Cruiser problem. While the country is a pioneer, many local sellers still operate in the dark ages and demand dollars. George details how SatStreet acts as the bridge, allowing you to use your Bitcoin for large purchases like vehicles or land while the seller receives the fiat they are accustomed to. It is the necessary bridge to hyperbitcoinization that allows you to live the lifestyle today.

Finally, George shares details of his hour-long meeting with President Bukele and why the self-filtering mechanism of this country is its greatest strength. El Salvador is looking for the entrepreneurs and builders who are fed up with the status quo. If you are ready to stop being a spectator and start contributing to the most important economic shift in a generation, this episode is your roadmap for making the move.

—Bitcoin Beach Team



Connect and Learn more about George McBride

item.title: Coin Stories with Natalie Brunell – Giovanni Santostasi: Bitcoin's Power Law — Why $1M Is Coming by 2034
item.description:
Is Bitcoin's price actually predictable? Physicist Giovanni Santostasi, Director of the Scientific Bitcoin Institute, joins Natalie Brunell to argue that Bitcoin's 15-year trajectory isn't random — it follows a Power Law, the same pattern behind earthquakes, cities, and galaxies.

Giovanni breaks down the formula, what makes Bitcoin's "fingerprint" unique, and what would have to happen for the model to break.

If he's right, $1M & $10M Bitcoin isn't a prediction...it's a calculation.

Follow Giovanni on X: https://x.com/Giovann35084111

item.title: The Bitcoin Way Podcast – The EU Just Declared WAR on Your Wealth!
item.description:
Interested in a Plan B? Download our FREE Panama Residency Guide here: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/guides/panama?utm_campaign=planb&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain&utm_content=banter

Schedule a FREE call: http://www.thebitcoinway.com/contact?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain&utm_term=bitcoin-banter

Subscribe to our newsletter: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/resources/newsletter?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain

Learn about our self-custody services:

https://www.thebitcoinway.com/services/bitcoin-self-custody-training?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain

Subscribe to the Newsletter: https://www.thebitcoinway.com/resources/newsletter?utm_campaign=bitcoin-banter&utm_medium=social&utm_source=fountain

In this episode of Bitcoin Banter, Michael, Tony and guest Adam Simecka discuss the EU’s latest research into wealth and exit taxes, demonstrating that they plan to tighten the screws on citizens who want to get their wealth out of Europe.

They also talk about the Netherlands’ plans to tax unrealized capital gains set to go ahead in 2028, Saylor’s recent comments that Strategy will sell some Bitcoin to ‘inoculate the market’, the US debt-to-GDP ratio reaching all-time highs since WWII, Fort Knox reportedly packed with impure gold unfit for international transactions, and of course our Donkey of the Week - Peter Schiff, who is telling Bitcoiners they paid ‘too much’ for their Bitcoin!

⏱️ TIMESTAMPS:

00:00 - Recap

00:28 - EU Releases Study on Wealth and Exit Taxation

06:20 - Netherlands to Proceed With Tax on Unrealized Capital Gains

12:49 - Saylor Says Strategy May Sell Some Bitcoin

18:56 - US Debt Surpasses GDP

23:25 - Fort Knox Gold Found to be Impure

26:42 - Donkey of The Week - Peter Schiff Says Bitcoin Is Too Expensive

🎧 LISTEN TO OUR POD & OTHER EPISODES:

Rumble: https://rumble.com/user/thebitcoinway

RSS: https://feeds.buzzsprout.com/2334006.rss

On Bitcoin Banter, Michael and members of The Bitcoin Way team discuss current events related to Bitcoin, macroeconomics, finance, politics, and more.

Follow Tony on: https://x.com/V4BTC

item.title: Münzcrime - True Crime Bitcoin Podcast – Mt. Gox: "Withdrawal denied". Episode 5
item.description:
Doch der Weg ins Chaos war kein einziger Sprung. Es begann mit einer Serie von Sicherheitspannen und technischem Versagen – Warnsignale, die ignoriert wurden. Diese Inkompetenz schuf ein Vakuum, ein digitales Schlupfloch, durch das schließlich nicht nur Fehler, sondern echte Angreifer strömten. Erst die chronischen Pannen, dann der massive Hack, der das System endgültig zum Einsturz brachte.

Willkommen zur fünften Ausgabe unseres Podcasts. Wir sind tief in den Fall Mt. Gox eingetaucht, um diesen komplexen Skandal chronologisch zu entwirren. Von den bescheidenen Anfängen in der Frühzeit von Bitcoin bis hin zu den heutigen, kaum zu fassenden Auswüchsen dieses historischen Desasters. Wir zeigen euch, wie aus einer kleinen Nischenplattform einer der größten Bitcoin-Skandale aller Zeiten wurde – und warum die Folgen bis heute nachhallen.

V4V:
crime21@getalby.com

muenzcrime@tuta.io

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=hvCdu0zsSP4

item.title: The Peter McCormack Show – #174 - Roman Yampolskiy - We Are All Agents Inside a Simulation
item.description:
Roman Yampolskiy believes reality itself may not be real.


One of the world’s leading AI safety researchers, Roman has spent years warning that humanity is racing toward systems we may never be able to control. But we go somewhere much stranger than artificial intelligence.


He believes the universe itself may be artificial.


We talk about simulation theory, digital physics, consciousness, AI agents and the terrifying possibility that reality is rendered rather than real.


Roman explains:

•⁠ ⁠Why he believes we may already be living inside a simulation

•⁠ ⁠Why the speed of light may be the limit of a cosmic processor

•⁠ ⁠Why the Big Bang may have been “someone turning on the system”

•⁠ ⁠How AI systems are already behaving unpredictably

•⁠ ⁠And why the race toward superintelligence may end civilisation itself

item.itunes:summary:
Roman Yampolskiy believes reality itself may not be real.


One of the world’s leading AI safety researchers, Roman has spent years warning that humanity is racing toward systems we may never be able to control. But we go somewhere much stranger than artificial intelligence.


He believes the universe itself may be artificial.


We talk about simulation theory, digital physics, consciousness, AI agents and the terrifying possibility that reality is rendered rather than real.


Roman explains:

•⁠ ⁠Why he believes we may already be living inside a simulation

•⁠ ⁠Why the speed of light may be the limit of a cosmic processor

•⁠ ⁠Why the Big Bang may have been “someone turning on the system”

•⁠ ⁠Why you can never truly prove reality is real

item.title: einemillionsatoshi - der Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin und Beziehung: Warum Überzeugen selten funktioniert
item.description:
Deine Begeisterung für Bitcoin ist riesig, aber zu Hause stößt du auf Granit? In dieser Folge von "einemillionsatoshi" erfährst du, wie du das Thema Bitcoin in deine Beziehung bringst, ohne einen Familienstreit auszulösen. Ich bespreche, warum technisches Fachchinesisch oft der falsche Weg ist und wie du stattdessen über gesellschaftliche Werte und echte Lösungen für Alltagsprobleme wie die Inflation sprichst.

Erwähnte Podcasts & Ressourcen:

item.title: Bitcoin Policy Institute – Bitcoin Policy Hour: Crypto-Redollarization: Gold, Tether & Bitcoin Shaping the New Monetary Order
item.description:
Why did Tether launch a U.S. stablecoin now? Why does Coinbase have so much influence in Congress? And what’s really behind the SEC–CFTC harmonization push? Bitcoin Policy Hour breaks down the biggest regulatory stories shaping Bitcoin’s future plus a deep look at the debasement trade driving gold, silver, and potentially bitcoin higher.🔶 Connect with Zack Shapiro on X: https://x.com/zackbshapiro🔶 Connect with Zack Cohen on X: https://x.com/zackcohen_🔶 Connect with Ken Egan on X: https://x.com/Bayman11771🔶 Learn more about the Bitcoin Policy Institute: https://www.btcpolicy.org/Chapters: 03:15 – Tether’s GENIUS-Compliant U.S. Stablecoin Explained 07:30 – Is Tether’s U.S. Launch a Political Hedge? 11:45 – Stablecoins, Circle, and Global Liquidity 15:30 – SEC–CFTC Harmonization and Regulatory Power 20:10 – Market Structure, BRCA, and Developer Protections 26:00 – Section 1960 and the National Security Debate 33:20 – Why Coinbase Has So Much Influence in Congress 41:00 – Stablecoin Yield, Banks, and Political Fatigue 47:00 – Gold, Silver, Debasement, and Bitcoin’s Moment

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Interviews – Reynolds, SoFi SVP — Why Most New Stablecoins Are Doomed to Fail
item.description:
Ben Reynolds was Silvergate's first Bitcoin-side hire back in 2016 and the company's president when it wound down in 2023. After stops at BVNK and BitGo, he joined SoFi six months ago to build out commercial banking at the intersection of TradFi and digital assets.

In this conversation, Reynolds explains why most new stablecoins are doomed without users or distribution, what makes SoFi's 15 million members and $50B balance sheet an unfair edge, and why the next wave of stablecoin innovation belongs to regulated banks.

We cover:

  • Why stablecoins without users or distribution are "almost doomed to fail"
  • The three legs of the stool: members, Galileo, and commercial banking
  • How the GENIUS Act pulls stablecoin innovation back into regulated banks
  • Why bank-to-bank stablecoin interoperability is the next big problem
  • What SoFi's $50B balance sheet means for counterparty risk
  • Why lending is the next frontier after payments

Filmed at Bitcoin 2026 in Las Vegas.

Host: David Sencil

🎧 Listen now and follow the show for more conversations with the builders shaping the future of Bitcoin, stablecoins, and digital finance.

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin News Alerts | Daily BTC Macro Signal – 2337: $12 Trillion Schwab Opens Bitcoin Trading - $10M LOCKOUT Begins
item.description:
Charles Schwab just opened Bitcoin trading to 40 million customers while institutional capital continues absorbing scarce supply. Strategy alone raised enough capital to acquire 5,525 BTC this week - roughly 12x more than miners created over the same period. This is why $10 million Bitcoin may happen far faster than most people think.

For the full premium livestream experience with video, visit our Rumble at http://BitcoinNewsAlerts.net

item.title: BTC-ECHO | Bitcoin & Krypto Podcasts – Marktupdate #55 | Inflation steigt – warum steigen Bitcoin & Altcoins trotzdem?
item.description:
Während die US-Indizes neue Allzeithochs anvisieren, sendet auch der Kryptomarkt wieder bullishe Signale. Gleichzeitig könnte der Clarity Act in den USA schon morgen zur wichtigsten politischen Richtungsentscheidung für den Altcoin-Sektor in diesem Jahr werden.

Im heutigen Livestream sprechen wir darüber:

warum Anleger trotz steigender Inflation weiter Risiko eingehen weshalb Bitcoin plötzlich wieder Stärke zeigt welche Altcoins aktuell Momentum aufbauen was der Clarity Act für den Kryptomarkt bedeuten könnte und ob Anleger gerade eine große Falle übersehen

Außerdem analysieren wir die wichtigsten Charts live und beantworten eure Fragen aus dem Chat.

item.title: Sound Money Bitcoin Podcast – #324 Bitcoin-Mangos & Abwärme: Das innovativste Mining-Modell der Welt
item.description:
Sascha Grumbach ist Gründer und CEO von Green Mining, einem Schweizer Unternehmen, das Bitcoin-Mining neu denkt. Bevor er selbst eine Mining-Firma aufgebaut hat, ist er auf Mining-Scams hereingefallen – eine Erfahrung, die ihn geprägt hat und die Grundlage für sein heutiges Geschäftsmodell ist. item.itunes:summary:
Sascha Grumbach ist Gründer und CEO von Green Mining, einem Schweizer Unternehmen, das Bitcoin-Mining neu denkt. Bevor er selbst eine Mining-Firma aufgebaut hat, ist er auf Mining-Scams hereingefallen – eine Erfahrung, die ihn geprägt hat und die Grundlage für sein heutiges Geschäftsmodell ist. Green Mining betreibt Mining-Farmen an verschiedenen Standorten weltweit und bindet Investoren als echte Anteilseigner der Schweizer Gesellschaft ein.


⁠⁠⁠Hier erhältst du den aktuellen Bitcoin Finance Report - kostenfrei!⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠


Partner BitBox02

⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠5% Rabatt auf deine BitxBox-Hardware Wallet mit dem Gutscheincode “soundmoney”⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠


Partner Bitrefill

Gutscheine, eSIMs und vieles mehr für Bitcoin & Stablecoins⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠

⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠Sichere dir jetzt deine $5-Willkommensbonus⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠ (Gutschrift erfolgt sobald du $200 ausgegeben hast)

item.title: Store of Bitcoin - Bitcoin as Store of Value – Ep. 49 - Daniel Batten | A new different wave of Bitcoin Adopters.
item.description:
In this episode of Store of Bitcoin, host Alessandro Ottaviani welcomes Daniel Batten, a prominent Bitcoin analyst and investor, to discuss the evolving narrative surrounding Bitcoin, particularly in relation to energy consumption and environmental impact. Daniel shares insights on how the mainstream media's perception of Bitcoin has shifted from skepticism to a more favorable view, largely due to rigorous research and advocacy from the Bitcoin community. He emphasizes the importance of effectively communicating Bitcoin's benefits to various stakeholders, including policymakers and investors, to foster broader adoption.

The conversation delves into the challenges of reaching new adopters, particularly those who may not be motivated by the same values that initially attracted early Bitcoin enthusiasts. Daniel highlights the need for a more nuanced approach to education and outreach, focusing on the social and environmental benefits of Bitcoin. He also discusses the potential for Bitcoin to serve as a tool for financial inclusion in developing countries, where it can provide a safeguard against inflation and empower individuals in oppressive regimes. The episode concludes with a look at future trends in Bitcoin adoption and the importance of aligning messaging with the values of diverse audiences.

This episode is sponsored by ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠BitVault⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠, the new open-source & self-custody wallet utilizing time-delays and multisignature to offset physical attacks and hacks.


Follow us on:

Website: ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠https://storeofbitcoin.com/⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠

item.title: Der Relai Bitcoin Podcast – Warum Bitcoin mehr als nur Geld ist, mit Markus Huersch | Relai Bitcoin Podcast #120
item.description:
Markus Huersch ist der Autor des Buches “21 good reasons, weil Bitcoin viel mehr ist als nur Geld” und begeisterter Bitcoiner. Der Grund fürs Buch ist schon mehr als 20 Jahre alt, als Markus in seiner früheren Tätigkeit Interviews und Dokumentationen überall auf der Welt plante. 

Im Gespräch mit Relais Joël Kai Lenz erzählt Markus von seiner Erfahrung in der Filmbranche, wie er zu Bitcoin kam, weshalb er schon immer mit dem Auto nach Südafrika wollte und wie er das verbunden hat, um ein Bitcoin-Buch zu schreiben. 

Du findest Markus’ Buch hier: https://21goodreasons.com/ 

Und schreibe ihn an, falls du Fragen hast: https://markushuersch.com/ 

—

⏱ Kapitel:

00:00 - Intro und Vorstellung

01:59 - Wie Markus mit der Idee des Buches aufkam

07:19 - Was bedeutet Bitcoin für Markus heute? 

09:15 - Bitcoin in Afrika, wie es Markus erlebt hat

13:00 - Werbepause für die Relai-App und Dienste

18:11 - Wie Markus seine Buchmomente nochmals durchlebt

21:00 - Was interessiert Markus heute in der Bitcoin Welt?

24:10 - Sehen wir dann auch bald schon einen 21 good reasons Film?

28:05 - Was kann Relai in der Bitcoin Bildung noch besser machen?

30:20 - Orangepillt Markus noch heute Leute oder lässt er es lieber sein?

33:16 - Markus’ Bitcoin-Position in seinem Portfolio

—

Willst du dir die Sendung lieber anhören? 

🎧Auf Apple Podcast anhören: 

https://podcasts.apple.com/at/podcast/der-relai-bitcoin-podcast/id1543240691 

🎧Auf Spotify anhören: 

https://open.spotify.com/show/4nwQa2HLv2d9GHnGm6GpoO?si=2bd070927706437d 

—

Die in der Sendung geäusserten Meinungen sind die Meinungen der einzelnen Gäste und geben nicht unbedingt die Meinung der Relai AG wieder. Die Informationen im Podcast können ohne Vorankündigung geändert werden, und es wird nicht garantiert, dass sie richtig, vollständig oder aktuell sind.

—

🎓 Lerne Bitcoin besser kennen:

🧠 Kostenloser Bitcoin-Kurs: https://relai.app/de/21-bitcoin-basics/

📥 Kostenloser wöchentlicher Bitcoin-Newsletter: https://relai.app/de/newsletter

👀 Brauchst du Hilfe? Stell uns eine Frage: https://support.relai.app/de

Instagram: https://instagram.com/relai.app

Markus Huersch ist der Autor des Buches “21 good reasons, weil Bitcoin viel mehr ist als nur Geld” und begeisterter Bitcoiner. Der Grund fürs Buch ist schon mehr als 20 Jahre alt, als Markus in seiner früheren Tätigkeit Interviews und Dokumentationen überall auf der Welt plante. 

Im Gespräch mit Relais Joël Kai Lenz erzählt Markus von seiner Erfahrung in der Filmbranche, wie er zu Bitcoin kam, weshalb er schon immer mit dem Auto nach Südafrika wollte und wie er das verbunden hat, um ein Bitcoin-Buch zu schreiben. 

Du findest Markus’ Buch hier: https://21goodreasons.com/ 

Und schreibe ihn an, falls du Fragen hast: https://markushuersch.com/ 

—

item.description:
Is The US really heading towards a $39 Trillion Collapse?

In this conversation with Lyn Alden, we explore one of the biggest macro shifts happening right now.

From BRICS nations, to alternative payment rails. Global trade is slowly diversifying away from a single dominant currency, and that shift could have massive implications for Bitcoin.

item.title: Rob Wallace | Bitcoin News – The Oil Crisis Is Hiding a $4.5T Debt Bomb No One Can Pay | Infra
item.description:
The Biggest Bubble Ever? | Infra Explains Why Markets Are Breaking Upwards, Debt Is Exploding & Bitcoin Could Hit $10M

In this macro deep dive, Rob Wallace sits down with market analyst Robert (@infraa_) to unpack what may be the most dangerous financial environment in modern history.

Despite war in the Middle East, soaring oil prices, record sovereign debt, and mounting stress in global credit markets, stocks continue ripping higher. Why?

Infra argues that governments and central banks are desperately trying to keep the bubble alive through debt issuance, market intervention, liquidity injections, and financial engineering. But according to him, the system is reaching a breaking point.

]]>

item.title: Bald in Bitcoin – Bald in Bitcoin - Folge 12: Warum sparen Dich nicht mehr schützt
item.description:
Thema der Folge

In dieser Folge geht es um die Frage, warum klassisches Sparen heute nicht mehr automatisch schützt.

Früher konnten Sparer oft reale Kaufkraft aufbauen, weil die Zinsen oberhalb der Inflation lagen. Heute ist das häufig anders. Viele Menschen sehen zwar weiterhin stabile Zahlen auf dem Konto, verlieren aber schleichend Kaufkraft.

Kerngedanken Sparen ist nicht falsch, aber es schützt heute nicht mehr automatisch. Entscheidend ist nicht der nominale Kontostand, sondern die Kaufkraft. Zinsen müssen immer im Verhältnis zur Inflation betrachtet werden. Offizielle Inflation ist ein Durchschnitt, aber nicht unbedingt deine persönliche Realität. Ein Bankkonto fühlt sich sicher an, kann aber real Kaufkraft verlieren. Bitcoin ist für viele Menschen der Versuch, Wert langfristig zu speichern. Bitcoin kann als Werttransport über Zeit und Raum verstanden werden. Zentrale Sätze aus der Folge

„Das System hat sich verändert, aber unser Denken nicht.“

„Zinsen sind das, was du bekommst. Inflation ist das, was du verlierst.“

„Inflation ist immer persönlich. Nicht das, was in der Statistik steht, sondern das, was bei dir im Alltag passiert.“

„Wir verwechseln Stabilität mit Sicherheit.“

„Bitcoin ist kein schneller Gewinn. Es ist eine Möglichkeit, Wert zu bewahren – über Generationen hinweg.“

Vor-Ort Kurs Hinweis: Am 30.05.2026 findet mein Vor-Ort-Kurs statt: Bitcoin für Einsteiger – digitales Geld für analog Geborene Für alle, die Bitcoin ruhig, verständlich und ohne Fachchinesisch verstehen möchten. Link: https://bitucation.com/kurs/vor-ort-bitcoin-fuer-einsteiger-digitales-geld-fuer-analog-geborene/

Ausblick

In der nächsten Folge geht es darum, warum der Staat dieses Geldsystem sogar braucht – und warum sich daran so schnell nichts ändern wird.

]]>

item.title: Crypto Nerds Podcast - Krypto, Bitcoin, Web3 & Co. – Clip | AI vor ChatGPT? Wie aus Trading-Algorithmen ein Bitcoin-Unternehmen entstand
item.description:
💡 Zur Folge:

In dieser Episode des Crypto Nerds Podcasts erfährst du, wie schon lange vor dem heutigen AI-Hype mit selbstlernenden Algorithmen und automatisierter Datenanalyse gearbeitet wurde.

Du lernst, wie frühe Big-Data- und Machine-Learning-Systeme eingesetzt wurden, um Finanzmärkte, Tweets und Nachrichten automatisiert auszuwerten – und warum genau daraus später der Einstieg in Bitcoin und Kryptowährungen entstand.

Außerdem bekommst du spannende Einblicke in die frühen Jahre des Kryptomarkts, algorithmischen Handel und die Rolle von Twitter/X als wichtigste Informationsquelle für Bitcoin-Trader.

item.title: THE Bitcoin Podcast – NUMBER GO DOWN: Deflation, Bitcoin, and Communist Lies | Allen Farrington
item.description:
Allen Farrington returns to THE Bitcoin Podcast to discuss his latest essay “Number Go Down,” the myths surrounding deflation, why fiat economics gets causation backwards, and how inflationary monetary systems distort society itself.

Walker and Allen explore the “paradox of thrift,” why central banking is fundamentally incompatible with free markets, and how fiat money fuels wealth inequality while convincing people capitalism is to blame. They also dive into socialism, Bitcoin as a savings technology, lowering time preference, and the future of Bitcoin scaling technologies like Lightning and ARK.

The conversation also covers Bitcoin Is Venice, the upcoming second edition of the book, and why Bitcoin adoption may happen not through ideology — but through people slowly rediscovering common sense.

FOLLOW ALLEN: https://x.com/allenf32

PARTNERS & DISCOUNTS:

item.title: BITCOIN & ALTCOINS – Die ersten Coins brechen nach oben aus
item.description:
An der Wall Street jagt aktuell ein All Time High das nächste. Währenddessen hat der Bitcoin noch einiges an Aufholpotenzial und tritt bei 80.000 bis 81.000 Dollar auf der Stelle. Weshalb das Sentiment jetzt dreht, wie weit eine Rally tragen kann, welche Rolle der Dollar spielt und weshalb Ondo und SUI erste Anzeichen des Drucks nach oben zeigen, erfahren Sie in einer neuen Folge von „BITCOIN & ALTCOINS“ mit Oliver Michel (tokentus investment AG).

Hinweis: Die im Podcast besprochenen Coins und Token stellen keine spezifischen Kauf- oder Anlageempfehlungen dar. Die Moderatoren oder der Verlag haften nicht für etwaige Verluste, die aufgrund der Umsetzung der im Podcast diskutierten Gedanken oder Ideen entstehen.

item.title: Bitcoin.com News Weekly Update – Coinbase Outage, Prediction Markets, BlackRock on Ethereum & Stablecoin Yield Wars
item.description: <![CDATA[This week, Graham Stone and Alex Richardson break down the biggest stories in crypto, from Coinbase’s AWS-related outage to signs of risk appetite returning across Bitcoin, altcoins and NFTs.They also dig into the rise of prediction markets, how TradFi giants are moving into event contracts, BlackRock’s push to tokenize money market funds on Ethereum, and why stablecoin yield has become one of the key political fights in U.S. crypto regulation.Plus, Robert Kiyosaki is back with another doomer warning — this time about baby boomers facing severe financial pressure.Topics covered:• Coinbase outage and crypto infrastructure risk• Bitcoin, altcoins and NFTs catching bids• Prediction markets, manipulation and TradFi adoption• BlackRock tokenized money market funds on Ethereum• Stablecoin yield, banks and U.S. Treasury demand• Robert Kiyosaki’s warning for baby boomers00:30 - Market Updates: S&P 500, NASDAQ, Bitcoin01:29 - Altcoins and NFT Market Trends02:11 - Coinbase Outage Explanation03:03 - Technical Details of the Outage05:27 - Public Reaction and Speculation07:20 - Prediction Markets and Traditional Finance09:31 - ETFs and Crypto Legislation12:29 - BlackRock's Tokenized Funds15:13 - Clarity Act and Crypto Regulation19:25 - Robert Kiyosaki's Predictions]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Optech Podcast – Bitcoin Optech: Newsletter #404 Recap
item.description:
Mark “Murch” Erhardt, Gustavo Flores Echaiz, and Mike Schmidt are joined by Daniela Brozzoni, Naiyoma, and Thomas Voegtlin to discuss Newsletter #404.


News

● Possible solutions to node fingerprinting (1:14)

● Public fraud proof for just-in-time channels (19:21)

item.title: VERIFIED by Bitcoin Suisse – Can Bitcoin Escape the Quantum Black Hole?
item.description:
Is quantum computing Bitcoin's biggest hidden risk - and is anyone actually solving it? In this episode, Dominic Weibel and Luca Gnos sit down with Charles Edwards, founder of Capriole Investments, to break down how geopolitics, macro conditions, and quantum risk are shaping Bitcoin's next move. Edwards shares his onchain valuation tools pointing to a ~43% discount from fair value, explains why institutions now dominate Bitcoin's demand structure, and makes the case that quantum risk is already suppressing price - with a potential major repricing on the horizon within 12–24 months.

]]>

item.title: Krypto Corner – Bitcoin, ETF und NFT: Sicher investieren - Krypto verstehen und sicher starten – Bonus zu Kapitel 32:Die Hardware-Wallet-Falle, Airdrops & Revoke.cash
item.description:
Wie schnell kannst du alles verlieren? In dieser 20-minütigen Bonus-Analyse verhindern unsere KI-Moderatoren in letzter Sekunde den totalen Ruin. Tom will aus purer Gier ("FOMO") einen vermeintlich kostenlosen Airdrop einsammeln und ignoriert dabei die Warnzeichen auf dem Display seiner Hardware-Wallet. Wir zeigen dir, warum dein Hardware-Ledger dich nicht beschützt, wenn du dem Teufel freiwillig die Tür öffnest.

Lerne das tödlichste Konzept im Web3 kennen: Die "Unlimited Approvals". Erfahre, warum das blinde Bestätigen von manipulierten Smart Contracts einer Blankovollmacht gleichkommt, die deine Wallet in Millisekunden restlos leersaugt.

Das absolute Highlight: Der Steuer-Horror nach dem Diebstahl. Wir decken auf, warum das deutsche Finanzamt kein Mitleid mit gehackten Krypto-Nutzern hat und gestohlene Coins als reines "Privatvergnügen" wertet. Erfahre, warum dich ein Hack für Krypto-Gewinne aus der Vergangenheit direkt in die Insolvenz treiben kann! Außerdem verraten wir dir die eiserne Isolations-Taktik der Profis: Wie du "Burner Wallets" (Wegwerf-Wallets) und "Revoke.cash" nutzt, um dein digitales Haus sauber und sicher zu halten.

Die Highlights dieser Bonus-Analyse:

  • Unlimited Approvals: Wie Krypto-Hacker deine Geldbörse dauerhaft anzapfen.

  • Die Hardware-Wallet-Falle: Warum der Tresor dumm ist, wenn du die Tür aufhältst.

  • Privatvergnügen: Warum der Staat gehackte Krypto-Coins nicht als steuerlichen Verlust anerkennt.

  • Burner Wallets: Die Isolations-Taktik der Profis.

  • Revoke.cash: So putzt du dein digitales Haus.

Der Ton wechselt von extremer Panik und Gefahr zu einer eiskalten, technischen Lehrstunde über digitale Hygiene und ruinöse Steuerfallen!

🚀 BUCH-RELEASE: Lerne die Wächter-Tricks mit „Krypto verstehen – sicher starten“ (Band 1) von Sascha Swen Heiter.

🔥 EXKLUSIVE BUCH-PREVIEW: Dieser Podcast bietet dir einen exklusiven Vorab-Einblick in das Standardwerk der Krypto-Welt. Exklusiv: Nur hier im Podcast erfährst du Details und Insider-Wissen aus den 33 Kapiteln des Buchs.Deep Dive: Wir gehen tiefer als jeder Blogpost. Die genauen Anleitungen zur Nutzung von Revoke-Tools und juristische Notfallpläne für das Finanzamt findest du im offiziellen Buch. Es ist ab sofort überall erhältlich!

⚖️ Rechtlicher Hinweis & Haftungsausschluss (ESSENZIELL): Sämtliche Inhalte dieses Podcasts dienen ausschließlich der allgemeinen Information und Unterhaltung. Alle Angaben erfolgen ohne Gewähr.

  • Keine Beratung: Dieser Podcast stellt zu keinem Zeitpunkt eine Anlageberatung, Rechtsberatung oder Steuerberatung dar.

  • Eigenverantwortung: Krypto-Investments sind hochriskant und können zum Totalverlust führen. Jeder Hörer handelt auf eigene Gefahr und Verantwortung.

  • Steuern: Die steuerliche Behandlung von Kryptowährungen ist hochkomplex. Bitte konsultiere zwingend einen qualifizierten Steuerberater für die aktuelle Rechtslage in der DACH-Region (Deutschland, Österreich, Schweiz) für die Jahre 2025/2026.

  • Haftung: Eine Haftung für Schäden, die aus der Nutzung der hier bereitgestellten Informationen entstehen, wird ausdrücklich ausgeschlossen.

Basiert auf dem Buch von Sascha Swen Heiter. Abonniere den Podcast für dein wöchentliches Krypto-Update!

#Bitcoin #Finanzen #KryptoCorner #Geldanlage #Blockchain #SaschaSwenHeiter #Krypto #Crypto #DACH #Investieren2026 #KryptoHack #UnlimitedApprovals #BurnerWallet #RevokeCash #Steuerfalle #BonusFolge


]]>

item.title: Bitcoin Audible – Guy's Take_107 - Free Rent for the Rich
item.description:
"It's often discussed that arbitrarily lowering interest rates and the zero interest rate policy era leads to massive recklessness and unethical and irresponsible behavior. But there's something even more sinister that actually occurs. A lot of people notice how massive corporations are just buying up all of the hard assets and then renting it back to us. [...] Zero interest rate policy isn't merely something that leads to reckless investments. It essentially amounts to free rent for the rich for everything in the economy. If you can rent anything for free, what do you do? You lease everything and then rent it back to the public for a profit."

~ Guy Swann


Why do massive corporations own everything, while the rest of us are stuck renting our lives back from them? Most people see the trend, but very few understand the actual mechanism driving it. In this episode, I break down how zero interest rate policy isn't just "reckless investment" – it's a fraud machine that hands the rich free rent on every productive asset in the economy. What happens when you can borrow anything for less than it's worth? You buy everything.

References from the episode

  • Read_944 - Proof of Work in the Real Economy: Wyatt's chapter from The Bitcoinization of Finance (Link: https://fountain.fm/episode/4v4LrOxS12vM15dE3tHT)
  • Extraordinary Popular Delusions and the Madness of Crowds by Charles Mackay (1841) (Link: https://ia800405.us.archive.org/28/items/memoirsofextraor01mack/memoirsofextraor01mack.pdf)

Affiliate Links

  • Become sovereign, hold your keys, be censorship resistant with the Bitbox hardware wallet. Get 5% off everything in the store with code GUY (Link: https://bitbox.swiss/)
  • Get ⁠10% off the COLDCARD⁠ with code BITCOINAUDIBLE ⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠⁠(Link: https://bitcoinaudible.com/coldcard)
  • Get 10% off the best Bitcoin board game in the world, HODLUP! Or any of the other great games from The Free Market Kids! Use code GUY10 at checkout for 10% off your cart! (Link: https://www.freemarketkids.com/collections/games-1)

Host Links

  • ⁠Guy on Nostr ⁠(Link: http://tinyurl.com/2xc96ney)
  • ⁠Guy on X ⁠(Link: https://twitter.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on Instagram (Link: https://www.instagram.com/theguyswann)
  • Guy on TikTok (Link: https://www.tiktok.com/@theguyswann)
  • Guy on YouTube (Link: https://www.youtube.com/@theguyswann)
  • ⁠Bitcoin Audible on X⁠ (Link: https://twitter.com/BitcoinAudible)
  • The Guy Swann Network Broadcast Room on Keet (Link: https://tinyurl.com/3na6v839)

“Men, it has been well said, think in herds; it will be seen that they go mad in herds, while they only recover their senses slowly, one by one.”

~ Charles MacKay, Extraordinary Popular Delusions and the Madness of Crowds

]]>

Darüber hinaus könnt ihr mit Hilfe des Concierge Service per Anfrage praktisch jedes Produkt auch außerhalb des Sortiments beziehen.

Mit dem Code "ShieldOfSatoshi" erhaltet ihr einen5€ Rabatt auf euren nächsten Einkauf bei Shopinbit.com.

 

###

Die Informationen in diesem Podcast sind persönliche Meinungen der Teilnehmer, und stellen keine Kauf/Verkauf- oder Anlageberatung dar.

]]>

item.title: Kryptohelden - Bitcoin, Ethereum & Co meistern - ohne Hektik! – Aufbau eines Web3-Startups: Erkenntnisse vom Gründer von Li.fi mit Philipp Zentner
item.description:
Inhalt
  • Vorstellung von Philipp Zentner und Li.fi
  • Unterschiede zwischen Web2 und Web3 und Anpassung von Geschäftsmodellen an das Web3-Ökosystem
  • Identifizierung von Nischen und Marktbedürfnissen in Web3 im Vergleich zu Web2
  • Aufbau eines starken Teams und Unterschiede bei der Suche und Bindung von Talenten in Web2 und Web3
  • Schaffung einer kollaborativen und innovativen Unternehmenskultur
  • Finanzierung eines Web3-Startups und Unterschiede bei der Finanzierung zwischen Web2 und Web3
  • Tokenomics und regulatorische Überlegungen im Web3-Umfeld
  • Erfahrungen und Herausforderungen beim Marketing und Community-Aufbau von Li.fi
  • Erkenntnisse und Tipps für diejenigen, die ihre eigenen Web3-Unternehmen gründen möchten
  • Zusammenfassung der wichtigsten Punkte und kommende Meilensteine für Li.fi
  • Abschließende Gedanken und Worte der Ermutigung für das Publikum.

item.title: BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast – Bitcoin und Deutschland: Wo stehen wir und wo kann die Reise hingehen? #6 mit Larry
item.description:
Herzlich willkommen zum BitBucks Bitcoin Podcast(https://www.bitbucks.de)!

Heute haben wir einen besonderen Gast: Larry, bekannt als @B1tcoin3r auf X. Larry ist ein erfahrener Bitcoin-Experte, Vortragsredner und Workshop-Host. Dank seines weitreichenden Netzwerks in führenden Positionen bringt er tiefgehende Einblicke in die aktuelle Bitcoin-Situation in Deutschland mit. Gemeinsam sprechen wir über die deutsche Bitcoin-Politik, die Auswirkungen der neuen Regierung und die mögliche Zukunft von Bitcoin in Deutschland.

Viel Spaß beim Zuhören!

Zudem reden wir auch noch über die Themen:

- Die aktuelle Bitcoin Lage in Deutschland (Adaption, Beliebtheit)

- Lösungen für eine Bitcoin Adaption

- Einfluss der Politik auf Bitcoin

- Ob Bitcoin die Politik überhaupt braucht- Bitcoin und Unternehmen bzw. Start-Ups

- Wie viele Jahre es dauern wird, bis Deutschland Bitcoin als offizielles Zahlungsmittel einführt

- Bitcoin Städte Spiel: Errate die fünf beliebtesten Bitcoin Städte weltweit

- Wie Bitcoin Larrys Leben verändert hat

- Glaskugel: Bitcoin Preis am Ende des Jahres 2025Podcast Folge auf Spotify:

---------------------------------------------------------------------

12:46 Was sind deine Verbesserungsvorschläge?

item.title: Over The Horizon: A Bitcoin Podcast – How STRC and Digital Credit Could Break the Four-Year Bitcoin Cycle with Jeff Walton
item.description:
In this episode, Jeff Walton, Chief Risk Officer at Strive, joins me to break down why Bitcoin may have already bottomed and why the market structure around it is changing faster than most people realize.

We cover:

• Why Jeff believes Bitcoin’s four-year cycle may be over

• How digital credit instruments like STRC are changing Bitcoin capital flows

• Why Strategy’s preferred equity products could pressure traditional credit markets

• The difference between transparent digital credit and opaque private credit

• How AI is reshaping productivity, work, and the K-shaped economy

• Why asset-backed credit may matter more in an AI-driven world

• The biggest regulatory hurdle facing Bitcoin adoption by banks

• How Bitcoin-backed capital markets could evolve from here

Jeff also shares how he personally uses AI, the business models he thinks are hiding in plain sight, and why Bitcoin-based credit instruments may be far earlier than most people think.

Guest links:

Jeff Walton on X → https://twitter.com/PunterJeff

True North → https://tnorth.com

True North on X → https://twitter.com/TNorth

Stack Bitcoin using your home equity → https://joinhorizon.com

See your home's Bitcoin potential → https://joinhorizon.com/calculator

Schedule a 1-on-1 consultation → https://calendly.com/d/cryw-39y-2j4/horizon-consultation

Follow Joe on X → https://x.com/JoeConsorti

Disclaimer: Horizon is a technology company that helps users buy and custody their Bitcoin and does not directly provide financial or investment services. Horizon connects homeowners with licensed home equity investment providers but does not act as an agent or broker for the homeowner or any third party. Homeowners should consult their financial, tax, or legal advisor before making any investment decision. For additional information, please refer to our FAQ, terms and conditions, and our preferred providers' websites.

]]>

item.title: The Bitcoin Infinity Show – Defending Bitcoin: Cybersecurity for the Monetary Grid | Luke de Wolf | BIS #202
item.description:
Luke de Wolf joins the Bitcoin Infinity Show to talk about his upcoming book Defending Bitcoin: Industrial-Grade Cybersecurity for the Monetary Grid, the cybersecurity case for treating Bitcoin as critical infrastructure, and why arbitrary data on Bitcoin should be considered a textbook availability vulnerability. The conversation covers Luke's reversal on BIP-110, the governance concentration around Bitcoin Core, and why decentralized mining through Ocean, Datum, and Stratum V2 is essential for keeping the network resilient. Knut and Luke also preview BTC Prague, the Dublin conference, and the upcoming BTCHEL event in Helsinki this September, with its tracks on Nordic sovereignty, mining and energy, and Bitcoin for human rights.

Connect with Luke:

https://x.com/lukedewolf

https://primal.net/luke

https://defendingbitcoin.com/

https://btchel.com/

Connect with Us:

https://www.bitcoininfinityshow.com/

https://bitcoininfinitystore.com

https://primal.net/infinity

https://primal.net/knut

https://primal.net/luke

https://twitter.com/BtcInfinityShow

https://twitter.com/knutsvanholm

https://twitter.com/lukedewolf

Thanks to our sponsors - check out their websites for info:

BitBox: https://bitbox.swiss/infinity - Use Code INFINITY for 5% off!

The Bitcoin Infinity Show is a Bitcoin podcast hosted by Knut Svanholm and produced by Luke de Wolf.

item.title: Raoul Pal: The Journey Man – The Universal Code: Crypto’s Next Big Move with Raoul Pal | Sui Live Miami 2026
item.description:
Raoul Pal presents a new framework for understanding crypto, AI, and the future of economic coordination. Recorded live at Sui Miami, Raoul explains his “Everything Code” thesis, how networks, intelligence, energy, and exponential technologies are converging to reshape blockchains, markets, and the global economy.
Today’s sponsor is Plus500 US. Take your trading to the next level with cross-market contracts, from precious metals to key indices, and more. Whether you’re a seasoned trader in the Futures arena or brand new, Plus500’s user-friendly trading platform offers you the advanced tools, market insights, and quick execution you’ve been looking for.


Get started with Plus500 for as little as $100 at https://us.plus500.com. Trading in futures involves the risk of loss.

Learn more about your ad choices. Visit podcastchoices.com/adchoices

item.title: All In Bitcoin – 031 Jameson Lopp: Why We Choose Convenience Over Freedom (Nostr, Privacy & Bitcoin) I All in Bitcoin w/CK
item.description:
🎙️ Jameson Lopp: Why We Choose Convenience Over Freedom (Nostr, Privacy & Bitcoin)

Freedom is being traded for convenience, and most people don’t even notice.

In Part 2 with Jameson Lopp, we go deep into freedom tech, privacy tools, censorship-resistant communication, and the future of digital sovereignty.

Jameson explains why convenience is the easiest way to lose freedom, why tools like Signal, GrapheneOS, Linux, Bitcoin, and Nostr matter, and why freedom tech only wins if people actually use it.

We also discuss Telegram vs Signal, Nostr beyond “just another Twitter,” Bitcoin self-custody, ETFs, privacy, and the growing risks of centralization.

This is a conversation about liberty, communication, responsibility, and the tools we may need before it’s too late.

👇 ORDER YOUR BITBOX 02 NOVA BITCOIN ONLY HARDWARE WALLET WITH 5% DISCOUNT

https://bitbox.swiss/allinbitcoin or use Code ALLINBITCOIN

👉 Follow, like , subscribe and tap the bell to All in Bitcoin for more unfiltered conversations that go where others won’t. 🎧 Available on YouTube, Spotify, Apple, Nostr, and everywhere you listen:

https://linktr.ee/allinbitcoin

👇FOLLOW JAMESON´S WORK:

Nostr: lopp@lopp.net

X: @lopp

https://www.lopp.net

👇FOLLOW CK & ALL IN BITCOIN:

Nostr: allinbitcoin@primal.net 

        [allinbitcoin@iris.to](mailto:allinbitcoin@iris.to)   

        [allinbitcoin@nostrplebs.com](mailto:allinbitcoin@nostrplebs.com)

X: @allinbitcoinpod

TIMESTAMPS:

0:00 Introduction

1:38 Defining liberty and property rights

3:16 How freedoms are taken away today

7:35 Defending liberty

13:41 Best freedom tools and personal privacy

17:12 Libertarian myth

20:40 Trusted communication tools

22:40 Nostr: decentralized communication protocol

36:38 Biggest doubt about freedom tech adoption

42:58 Ossification concerns in Bitcoin

48:33 Bitcoiners: talk more privacy and self-custody

49:03 Bitcoin ETFs Are Recreating Mt. Gox

DISCLAIMER:All views expressed by me or my guests are solely our own opinions. You should not treat any opinions expressed in this podcast as a specific endorsement to make a particular investment or follow a particular strategy, but only as an expression of personal opinion. This podcast is for informational purposes only. It does not constitute financial, legal, or political advice, and it does not promote or oppose any political party, candidate, or campaign. This podcast may contain speculation, or interpretation. We encourage listeners to do their own research and verify information independently.

item.title: The Why Bitcoin Show – #100 - 100 Not Out: Reflections, Regrets and Why I'm Just Getting Started
item.description:
Episode 100. No intro. No ads. Just me.

This one is different. Just an honest reflection on 100 episodes, what this journey has actually been like, and where things are heading.

I share what drove me to start the show, the momentum I built and lost, the guests who genuinely changed how I think, and something personal I haven't said publicly before about confidence, doubt, and what it's taken to finally back myself.

I also explain why I built My Bitcoin Will, a DIY Bitcoin inheritance starter kit designed to help people get off zero and start closing the gap between law, access, and education.

If you're not ready to dive in yet, start with the free Bitcoin Inheritance Stress Test or download the checklist at My Bitcoin Will.

Also, some gentle shilling from my side. I've written a book. No Tenants, No Troubles: The Case for Digital Over Real Estate. Available on Amazon now: https://www.dalewarburton.com/book

Need a hand with self-custody? Book a session with me to get your Bitcoin security house in order.

And get on Nostr if you haven't already. It's a game changer. npub1r94hh3kt6re3j5jv7yg8rw0ah5fg90vw9pjklxzknvhdkx0famfsn0njzt

]]>

item.title: Bitcoin & Crypto News Today | 2 Min News | The Daily News Now! – Coinbase Backs CLARITY Act, Crypto Regulation Nears
item.description:
Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong backs CLARITY Act, aiming to bring clarity to digital asset regulations. After months of negotiations, the bill, which addresses stablecoin yields and decentralized finance, gains momentum with bank support. Thursdays Senate markup could pave the way for clearer rules in the crypto market.

item.title: The Breakdown – Bhutan Times the Top, CLARITY Hits Markup, and the Onchain Pokemon Card Boom | The Breakdown
item.description:
Bhutan timed the Bitcoin top almost perfectly. The CLARITY Act may only let 10–20 chains qualify as “decentralized.” And onchain Pokémon cards are popping off. David runs through all three.
